tagging_rule: Subtags are NOUNS and proper names only. Tag format in domain_tags_pipe: SectorCode:SubtagCode (e.g., HC:MOB, FIN:LBO). primary_sector field uses sector_name. domain_tags_pipe accepts NULL for sector-agnostic nuggets.
